# Release {{VERSION}}

## Artifacts

- Windows: `pycdc-studio-{{VERSION}}-windows-x64.zip`
- Linux: `pycdc-studio-{{VERSION}}-linux-x64.tar.gz`

## Notes

- Built manually from GitHub Actions workflow dispatch
- Windows and Linux packages are published together in this release
- Bundled third-party binaries and notices are included in the release packages

## Included upstream dependency

- `pycdc` / `pycdas`
- Upstream repository: https://github.com/zrax/pycdc
